description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular body with a matte olive green finish covering most of its exterior, contrasted by a black stock and grip. The receiver is boxy and streamlined, with minimal external detailing, giving it a utilitarian, tactical appearance. The barrel is relatively short and thick, extending slightly from the main body, and is capped with a simple muzzle. The stock is solid and straight, with a pronounced cheek rest and a sturdy, ergonomic pistol grip for secure handling. The trigger guard is large and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the magazine well is integrated into the lower receiver. Overall, the design suggests a modern, combat-oriented shotgun suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, olive green tactical shotgun with a boxy receiver, short barrel, and black ergonomic stock and grip. Its squared trigger guard and minimalistic design emphasize utility and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full olive green receiver, black stock, and grip, with the short barrel extending to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the narrow width of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, squared trigger guard with a simple, robust shape and no visible finger grooves
